privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At NewsHub, we take the privacy of our users very seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect the personal information you provide when using our website.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and preferences when you interact with our contact forms, newsletters, or other services.

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
sections.content: The information we collect is used to improve the user experience, send relevant communications, and personalize the content we offer.

sections.title: 3. Information Protection
sections.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure.

sections.title: 4. Cookies and Similar Technologies
sections.content: NewsHub may use cookies to improve website functionality and analyze traffic. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our site may contain links to third-party websites. NewsHub is not responsible for the privacy policies of these external sites.

sections.title: 6. Changes to the Privacy Policy
sections.content: We reserve the right to update this policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the corresponding update date.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us via email:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to NewsHub. By accessing and using our website, you agree to comply with the following terms of use:

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using NewsHub, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you disagree, please do not use our site.

sections.title: 2. Permitted Use
sections.content: You may use the site for personal and non-commercial purposes only. Copying, reproducing, distributing, or modifying any content without authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 3. User Content
sections.content: Any comments or content you post must be appropriate, respectful, and not infringe on the rights of third parties.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on NewsHub, including text, images, logos, and graphics, is protected by copyright and trademarks.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: NewsHub is not responsible for any direct or indirect damages that may arise from the use of this website or the information contained herein.

sections.title: 6. External Links
sections.content: Our site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these external sites.

sections.title: 7. Modifications
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect upon publication on this site.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about these terms of use, you can contact us via email:
